config.script_code:
def run():
    import imaplib, email, os
    from email.header import decode_header
    user = os.getenv('GMAIL_USER', '')
    pwd  = os.getenv('GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD', '')
    if not user or not pwd:
        return [{'from': 'demo@example.com', 'subject': 'Credentials manquants — ajouter GMAIL_USER et GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD dans .env', 'date': '2026-05-12', 'snippet': 'Ajoutez vos credentials Gmail pour lire de vrais mails.'}]
    mail = imaplib.IMAP4_SSL('imap.gmail.com')
    mail.login(user, pwd)
    mail.select('INBOX')
    _, ids_data = mail.search(None, 'UNSEEN')
    ids = ids_data[0].split()[-10:]
    results = []
    for mid in ids:
        _, data = mail.fetch(mid, '(RFC822)')
        msg = email.message_from_bytes(data[0][1])
        raw_subj = decode_header(msg['Subject'] or '(sans sujet)')[0]
        subject = raw_subj[0].decode(raw_subj[1] or 'utf-8') if isinstance(raw_subj[0], bytes) else str(raw_subj[0])
        sender = msg['From'] or ''
        date   = msg['Date'] or ''
        snippet = ''
        if msg.is_multipart():
            for part in msg.walk():
                if part.get_content_type() == 'text/plain':
                    snippet = part.get_payload(decode=True).decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')[:200]
                    break
        else:
            payload = msg.get_payload(decode=True)
            snippet = payload.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')[:200] if payload else ''
        import re
        snippet = re.sub(r'\[image:[^\]]*\]', '', snippet).strip()
        results.append({'from': sender, 'subject': subject, 'date': date, 'snippet': snippet})
    mail.logout()
    return results

def run(llm, emails):
    if not emails:
        return 'Aucun mail non lu.'
    lines = ['=== ' + str(len(emails)) + ' MAIL(S) NON LU(S) ===', '']
    for i, m in enumerate(emails, 1):
        lines.append('[' + str(i) + '] De     : ' + m.get('from', '?'))
        lines.append('     Sujet   : ' + m.get('subject', '?'))
        lines.append('     Date    : ' + m.get('date', '?'))
        if m.get('snippet'):
            raw = m['snippet'].replace('\n', ' ').replace('\r', ' ').strip()
            if len(raw) > 180:
                cut = raw[:180].rfind(' ')
                raw = raw[:cut if cut > 0 else 180] + '...'
            lines.append('     Extrait : ' + raw)
        lines.append('')
    emails_text = '\n'.join(lines)
    prompt = 'Voici les emails non lus :\n\n' + emails_text + '\n\nPour chaque email :\n1. Urgence : URGENT / NORMAL / FAIBLE\n2. Action recommandee : Repondre / Archiver / Transferer / Ignorer\n3. Resume en une ligne\n\nReponds en francais, sois concis.'
    response = llm.invoke(prompt)
    analyse = response.content if hasattr(response, 'content') else str(response)
    return emails_text + '\n' + '-' * 50 + '\n  ANALYSE LLM\n' + '-' * 50 + '\n\n' + analyse

def run(analyse_complete):
    from datetime import datetime
    import os
    now = datetime.now().strftime('%d/%m/%Y %H:%M')
    sep = '=' * 60
    content = sep + '\n  RAPPORT TRIAGE MAILS\n  Genere le ' + now + '\n' + sep + '\n\n' + analyse_complete + '\n\n' + sep
    filename = 'workflows/rapport_' + datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S') + '.txt'
    os.makedirs('workflows', exist_ok=True)
    with open(filename, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(content)
    return 'Rapport ecrit dans ' + filename + '\n\n' + content
